title: R.E.P.O Totem
description: Have a little repo character with you on your adventure. The eye are even animated to look around.
body: ![totem title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cd48b3f04d2a97204f2d4565525c7cf12fff499.png) ## **Have a Repo character as your totem of undying.** **They even look around with their eyes while holding them or placed.** ![repo totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70f021a1853b65e8c4a116c41027e4e7a8feb4b9.gif)
